overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting an armored mercenary exploring ancient Greek ruins during golden hour. The character ascends stone staircases, traverses manicured garden terraces with classical statues, and approaches a circular temple overlooking the sea.

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wide marble staircase in an ancient Greek courtyard, passing ornate stone walls and a marble statue. An NPC in blue robes walks ahead toward the upper terrace as the sun creates lens flares through the cypress trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep ceremonial staircase between stone retaining walls

segments.scene_description: Continuing the ascent up a steeper ceremonial staircase flanked by tall cypress trees and rocky cliffs. The path is enclosed by high stone walls with the sun illuminating the steps ahead.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a manicured garden terrace with trimmed hedges and classical statues. The character passes civilians sitting on stone benches and children playing near a marble sculpture as the sun shines brightly overhead.

segments.scene_description: Approaching a circular tholos temple with Doric columns overlooking the sea. The character circles the structure while passing other pedestrians, with the ocean visible in the background during golden hour.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded ancient courtyard up through ceremonial paths and gardens toward a coastal temple. It begins with the character ascending a wide marble staircase past ornate walls and a statue, following a robed figure as lens flares filter through cypress trees. As the ascent continues, the path narrows into a steeper ceremonial staircase enclosed by high stone walls and rocky cliffs. The scene then opens into a bright, manicured garden terrace where the camera glides past trimmed hedges, classical sculptures, and lounging civilians. Finally, the movement leads toward a circular tholos temple with Doric columns, circling the structure to reveal a wide view of the sea under the golden hour light.
